"use client"

import { GripVertical } from "lucide-react"
import * as ResizablePrimitive from "react-resizable-panels"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

const ResizablePanelGroup = ({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof ResizablePrimitive.PanelGroup>) => (
  <ResizablePrimitive.PanelGroup
    className={tw.def([className], {
            display: "flex",
            height: "h-full",
            width: "w-full",
            "data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]": {
                flexDirection: "data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]:flex-col",
            },
        })}
    {...props}
  />
)

const ResizablePanel = ResizablePrimitive.Panel

const ResizableHandle = ({
  withHandle,
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof ResizablePrimitive.PanelResizeHandle> & {
  withHandle?: boolean
}) => (
  <ResizablePrimitive.PanelResizeHandle
    className={tw.def([className], {
            position: "relative",
            display: "flex",
            width: "w-px",
            alignItems: "items-center",
            justifyContent: "justify-center",
            backgroundColor: "bg-border",
            after: {
                position: "after:absolute",
                inset: "after:inset-y-0",
                left: "after:left-1/2",
                width: "after:w-1",
                translate: "after:-translate-x-1/2",
            },
            "focus-visible": {
                outlineStyle: "focus-visible:outline-none",
                boxShadow: ["focus-visible:ring-1", "focus-visible:ring-ring", "focus-visible:ring-offset-1"],
            },
            "data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]": {
                height: "data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]:h-px",
                width: "data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]:w-full",
                after: {
                    left: "data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]:after:left-0",
                    height: "data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]:after:h-1",
                    width: "data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]:after:w-full",
                    translate: ["data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]:after:-translate-y-1/2", "data-[panel-group-direction=vertical]:after:translate-x-0"],
                },
            },
            "[&[data-panel-group-direction=vertical]>div]": {
                rotate: "[&[data-panel-group-direction=vertical]>div]:rotate-90",
            },
        })}
    {...props}
  >
    {withHandle && (
      <div className={tw.style({
                zIndex: "z-10",
                display: "flex",
                height: "h-4",
                width: "w-3",
                alignItems: "items-center",
                justifyContent: "justify-center",
                borderRadius: "rounded-sm",
                borderWidth: "border",
                backgroundColor: "bg-border",
            }).class()}>
        <GripVertical className={tw.style({
                    height: "h-2.5",
                    width: "w-2.5",
                }).class()} />
      </div>
    )}
  </ResizablePrimitive.PanelResizeHandle>
)

export { ResizablePanelGroup, ResizablePanel, ResizableHandle }
